# External Docs

This directory holds committed, public-safe documentation. Nothing here may
contain internal cluster topology, node IPs/hostnames, private endpoint URLs,
model-inventory names, credential locations, or secrets.

Current buckets:

- [`architecture/`](architecture/)
- [`roadmap/`](roadmap/)
- [`phases/`](phases/)
- [`research/`](research/)
- [`use-cases/`](use-cases/)
- [`diagrams/`](diagrams/)

Operational material belongs in gitignored `docs/internal/` or the private
context repository, not in this public-facing tree.
